title: Build the first end-to-end slice
summary: Ship one believable vertical slice that proves the product direction in code.
acceptance: A user can complete one meaningful workflow end to end.
Basic validation and failure handling exist.
Any new behavior is covered by checks or tests that can run in the loop.
notes: Do not stop at scaffolding if a runnable slice is possible.
If design polish matters, verify it with screenshots once a UI exists.
